text: Being here fills me with a quiet sense of curiosity. The glass walls separate me from a room of focused minds, busy with creation or learning, their attention captured by glowing screens—the modern fire. Stepping closer, the vivid wall celebrates "R+D," and I feel the pulse of human intellect converging with innovation. I am both observer and participant in this temple of research, awed by the collective pursuit to understand and reshape the world. There is energy, a sense of becoming, and the faint hum of anticipation for what these efforts will yield.
